mapper.sql: id, user_id, category_id, title, content, images, view_count, like_count, comment_count, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (user_id, category_id, title, content, images, view_count, like_count, comment_count, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{images}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET user_id = #{userId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, images = #{images}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, status = #{status}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM post WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = comment_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE post SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE post SET comment_count = CASE WHEN comment_count >= #{delta} THEN comment_count - #{delta} ELSE 0 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId}
